package: Jack Wix Junior Gold dashboard selected-bowler context v5
checks: Fourteen parser, history, archive, and live explorer regression tests pass
All 1,341 final 2025 U18 Boys profiles have unique USBC IDs and reconciled totals and averages
The live Round 1 U18 Boys PDF produces 689 validated 2026 standings profiles
Rounds 2 through 4 are correctly classified as unpublished placeholders
Jack's games, block total, grand total, average, rank, and field size match the official report
Bowler selection updates the page title, hero, official link, statistics, scores, progress, cut copy, comparison, path, guide, and share context
Selected 2026 cross-year, 2026 live-only, and archived 2025 profiles show only source-backed sections
Every dashboard section is collapsed after each page load; expand and collapse controls affect only available sections
Per-section visibility preferences persist in the browser and context-unavailable controls are disabled automatically
A 390-pixel phone viewport has no horizontal overflow and the visibility manager uses one-column controls
No stale Jack references are visibly rendered when a different bowler is active
Browser console has no warnings or errors
Updater preserves the fixed 2025 archive and performs conflict-safe live-data pushes
